data.text: The app now supports dark mode and offline access. Users can toggle dark mode in settings; offline data syncs when reconnected.
choices: ダークモードとオフラインに対応。設定で切替可、復帰時に同期。

data.text: A: We should cancel the event.
choices: Before we decide, what are the costs of canceling vs postponing?
data.explain: 選択肢を比較して決定。

data.text: The RCT enrolled 3,000 participants across 12 sites. The primary endpoint showed a 15% reduction in all-cause mortality, though secondary endpoints were mixed and the dropout rate of 18% raised questions about generalizability.
choices: 12施設3000人のRCTで全死因死亡率15%減少。ただし副次評価項目は混合的で脱落率18%から一般化可能性に疑問。
全評価項目で有意差あり。
